title: Mate-pair Large Libraries Preparation for Assembly of the Lateolabrax Maculatus Genome
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ss2eege
materials: Fragmented DNA labeled with biotin was captured on M280 streptavidin beads (Invitrogen, CA, USA), followed by end repair (30 min. at 20°C, 1000 rotation per minute, rpm, vibrate for 15 sec. per 2 min.), A-tailing (30 min. at 37°C, 1000 rpm vibrate for 15 sec. per 2 min.). M280 streptavidin beads Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher 00:30:00 Undetermined 00:00:15 00:30:00 Undetermined 00:00:15

PCR amplifications on beads 95°C 3 min., (98 °C 20 sec., 60 °C 15 sec., 72 °C 45 sec.) for N cycles, 72 °C 10 min., 4°C hold (For 2 kb library, N=16; For 5 kb library, 10 kb library and 20 kb library, N=18)] using Enzymatics (MA, USA) and NEB (MA, USA) reagent. 00:03:00 Undetermined

steps.title: The genomic DNA was fragmented using...
steps.instruction: The genomic DNA was fragmented using a Covaris E220 ultrasonicator (Covaris, Brighton, UK) to obtain ~2kb (for 2 kb library) and a Hydroshear (GeneMachines, CA, USA) to obtain ~5 kb, ~10 kb and ~20kb fragments (for 5 kb, 10 kb and 20 kb libraries respectively). (Covaris, 1, E220 ultrasonicator) (GeneMachines, 1, Hydroshear)

steps.title: Repaired using T4 DNA polymerase, (ENZYMATICS, Beverly, the U
steps.instruction: Repaired using T4 DNA polymerase, (ENZYMATICS, Beverly, the U.S.) 30 min at 20 ℃. T4 DNA polymerase Enzymatics 00:30:00 Undetermined

steps.title: Add Biotin Label by Biotin dNTP...
steps.instruction: Add Biotin Label by Biotin dNTP Mix (5mM) 30 min at 20 ℃. Biotin dNTP Mix Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher 00:30:00 Undetermined

steps.title: These fragments were further selected into size ranges of 2–2
steps.instruction: These fragments were further selected into size ranges of 2–2.4 kb, 5–5.5 kb, 10–11 kb or 20-23 kb by agarose gel electrophoresis.

steps.title: The T4 and T3 DNA ligase...
steps.instruction: The T4 and T3 DNA ligase were used to connect the ring. And then, Covaris LE220 was used to cyclizing DNA fragments. T3 DNA ligase Enzymatics

steps.title: Adaptor ligation (1h at 20°C, 1000rmp...
steps.instruction: Adaptor ligation (1h at 20°C, 1000rmp vibrate for 15 sec per 2 min.). 01:00:00 Undetermined 00:00:15
